description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 19 hrs 38 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 8 mins per day. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty: #106 through #117. His tracked work was spread across 4 projects, with Python, Markdown, SQL, and TypeScript among the languages used.
